meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code Skills to Scale Your Apps
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to break through development plateaus. This intermediate guide helps freelancers ship high-quality, complex apps faster.
content.answer_block: To overcome development stagnation, implement a structured Claude Code workflow. By integrating Antigravity for architectural scaffolding and Claude Code for iterative execution, you transform from manual coding to AI-assisted engineering. This approach automates boilerplate, enforces best practices, and accelerates your time-to-market, allowing you to handle complex client requirements with ease.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: you’re staring at a project that should be simple, but the architecture feels like a house of cards. You’re trapped in a cycle of basic CRUD apps, manual debugging, and the crushing weight of scope creep. The gap between a 'code monkey' and a high-ticket AI engineer isn't just about syntax—it's about the speed and authority with which you solve complex problems.

The breakthrough lies in moving beyond the browser. By leveraging Claude Code’s command-line precision alongside Antigravity's rapid scaffolding, you stop fighting your IDE and start orchestrating your output. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about building a repeatable, professional system that makes your clients wonder how you finished a month’s worth of work in a single afternoon.

steps.title: Initialize Project Scaffolding
steps.description: Establish a robust foundation using Antigravity to ensure your project structure follows enterprise-grade patterns before writing a single line of business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a clean, modular TypeScript project structure using Next.js 14, Tailwind, and Prisma, optimized for scalability and rapid feature iteration.

steps.title: Contextualize the Knowledge Base
steps.description: Claude Code performs best when it knows your project's constraints. Use this step to feed it your architectural requirements.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a .claudeprompt file that defines our coding standards, naming conventions, and preferred testing library (Vitest).

steps.title: Automate Feature Implementation
steps.description: Stop manual coding. Use Claude Code to translate your high-level intent into functional, production-ready modules.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a secure user authentication middleware with JWT validation and rate limiting using the established project structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement authentication middleware with rate limiting'

steps.title: Refactor for Performance
steps.description: Leverage AI to identify bottlenecks in your code that you might have missed during the rapid development phase.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current codebase for performance bottlenecks and suggest optimizations for database query efficiency and memory usage.

steps.title: Automated Testing & QA
steps.description: Ensure your code is bulletproof. Generate unit tests for every new module to maintain client-grade stability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate comprehensive unit tests for the auth and API modules, covering edge cases and error handling scenarios.

pro_tips: Always use a custom .claudeprompt file in your project root to force consistency across every AI-assisted session.
Use 'claude diff' to review every change before committing; never trust the AI blindly on complex logic rewrites.
Chain your prompts: ask the AI to explain the architectural choice before it writes the implementation code.
Keep your context window clean by periodically clearing old, irrelevant logs or temporary files from the Claude context.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation as you code—this adds massive perceived value to your final client delivery.
content.next_steps: Now that you have your environment set up, pick one legacy project and refactor a single module using this workflow to experience the speed boost firsthand.
content.conversion_block: You are now equipped to stop building basic apps and start engineering professional-grade software. The difference is in your workflow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
